title: IdentityComponent
description: ECS Component attached to User entity per [[ecs-architecture-freeside]]. Carries credentials, presentation handles, social links, and per-tenant identity data. Component composition: User Entity + IdentityComponent + per-Wallet FactorEvent Components (score-mibera domain).

user_sub.description: Foreign key to User.sub. ECS-style component reference.

credentials.description: Bound credentials. Per credential type: siwe = wallet+sig·passkey = WebAuthn·dynamic = Dynamic SDK ID·seedvault = Solana SeedVault (V2)·legacy = pre-Dynamic onboarding.

handle.description: Display handle (e.g., '@soju'). User-chosen, presented in chat-medium per [[chat-medium-presentation-boundary]].

discord_username.description: Discord display name (cached for fallback when bot can't fetch live).

mibera_id.description: Bound Mibera/Grail token ID. References on-chain. Optional; not all users hold.

pfp_url.description: Profile picture URL. Per-character: assets.0xhoneyjar.xyz/Mibera/grails/{slug}.webp pattern for Grails.

pfp_attribution.description: Attribution for non-Grail PFPs (cubquest's avatar, mibera's chosen visual, etc).
